x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Centers of Excellence (COEs) define the organizational routing structure Now Assist uses for intelligent HR case assignment. Without COEs, Now Assist cannot provide department-aware AI routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure HR COEs aligned to your HR organizational structure via sn_hr_core_coe_list.do. Assign HR services to appropriate COEs. Target: 3+ active COEs. Now Assist HRSD uses COE structure for AI-driven case routing recommendations.
